commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Windows QMD shim/package fallback resolution, adds guarded URL-download handling for OpenAI-compatible image responses, exports related SDK helpers, updates docs/tests, and currently includes root dependency/lockfile plus unrelated formatting changes.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear path: current main still resolves packageName "qmd" and only parses b64_json image responses, while the PR supplies after-fix Windows and URL-image proof; I did not run a live current-main failing repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can scrub the dependency graph change and unrelated formatting churn, but maintainers must still accept or revise the URL-download provider transport boundary before merge.
